scenarios.title: Data Versioning And ML Pipelines
scenarios.when_to_read: Use when a task involves DVC, Data Version Control, dvc CLI, dvc.yaml, .dvc files, pipeline reproduction, data cache, remotes, experiments, metrics, params, plots, or Python API access to DVC-tracked data.
scenarios.role: Provides self-contained DVC CLI/API guidance for data tracking, reproducible pipelines, experiments, remote/cache operations, reporting, and Python access.
scenarios.read_when: Signals include dvc init/add/stage/repro/status/push/pull/remote/exp/metrics/params/plots, dvc.api, DVCFileSystem, dvc.yaml, dvc.lock, .dvc, DVC cache, remote storage extras, experiment queues, or DVC codebase tests.
scenarios.best_for: Building or debugging DVC workflows, choosing safe DVC commands, using DVC Python APIs, diagnosing optional remote backend failures, and maintaining the DVC repository with focused tests.
scenarios.avoid_when: Avoid for generic Git, unrelated ML training frameworks, cloud storage tasks that do not involve DVC, or agent-skill authoring/verification workflows.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `dvc` when DVC-specific command syntax, file formats, cache/remotes, experiment semantics, public dvc.api behavior, or DVC repository tests matter; then route to the most specific sub-skill by task family.
